title: Virtual Mineality
description: A Vivecraft-based modpack that offers performance tweaks, shaders, visual and sound enhancements, & QoL features.
body:
![Virtual Mineality Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94319ccdc84b0b5bf9e5b7553d0f4cf27de051e8.png)

**Virtual Mineality** is a PCVR/Vivecraft-focused modpack curated by [pvrz](https://modrinth.com/user/pvrz), designed to elevate your Minecraft experience with a balance of performance, immersion, and quality-of-life enhancements. It features cutting-edge optimization mods like Sodium and Krypton, stunning visuals powered by the Iris modification and with shader packs such as Complementary Shaders, and immersive QoL additions including enhanced particles, dynamic sound upgrades, intuitive settings tweaks, and expanded chat functionality.

<details>
<summary>Gameplay Clip</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ljwQEdEjw3Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Specs in Clip: 
- RTX 4070
- Ryzen 7
- 4 TB SSD & 500 GB SSD
- 64GB RAM
- Windows 11 
- Quest 2 (Playing via Virtual Desktop, Link Cable works as well, of course!)
</details>
